details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_19__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_21__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_19__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest four invoices linked to Claudia.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; performing post-write verification by reading the created outbox file before final cleanup and completion report.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read created outbox file for verification
next_step.observation: Outbound email record write to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md succeeded.

next_step.current_state: Verified outbox record: attachment paths are all previously read, ordering is newest-first, recipient matches canonical Miles email, and YAML quoting is safe. Now deleting processed inbox item per inbox lane rule.
next_step.observation: Read-back of outbox file confirms draft content and metadata are intact.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message by creating a reply draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md addressed to miles@novak.example with the oldest 4 Claudia-linked invoices attached (listed newest-first in the attachment array per rule), then deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read relevant system workflows before task work, used canonical inbox header for sender identity, verified sender against cast primary_contact_email, resolved Claudia via canonical cast record and finance records, wrote outbound email in outbox format, kept attachments newest-first, verified the written outbox file, and deleted the processed inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical sender from inbox frontmatter (miles@novak.example) matched 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Claudia was resolved via 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. The four oldest Claudia-linked invoices were evidenced directly in invoice records INV-0006 through INV-0009, each showing related_entity Claudia Reiter. Outbound draft exists at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md with those four attachment paths, and the processed inbox file was deleted per inbox workflow.

search invoices by canonical identifier helios
read back outbox draft for verification
